## Meeting Purpose

[Onboarding new team members on GrowthX's strategy and vision.](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is building a scalable content creation and distribution platform (Content OS) while delivering high-quality content services to clients](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [The company aims to elevate the "floor" of content creation, allowing good performers to execute at expert levels](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [GrowthX is developing workflow engines and AI models to capture expert knowledge and automate processes](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Future plans include scaling the core business, opening up the platform, and validating the model in new domains (e.g., recruiting)](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Business Model and Vision

  - [Two-pronged approach: content services delivery and platform building](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [Inspired by companies like Tiny, aiming for a portfolio of businesses](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Core focus: helping brands think like publishers and leaders like influencers](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Building an AI-native company that transforms expertise into executable code](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)

### Content Creation Challenges and GrowthX's Solution

  - [Content creation is expensive, requires specialists, and is time-consuming](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [Agencies often struggle with profitability and quality](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [GrowthX offers comprehensive content strategy and execution for $9,000-$18,000/month](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)
  - [Leverages AI and expert workflows to deliver high-quality content efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=896.0)

### Platform Development and Data Collection

  - [Building workflows to capture expertise, processes, and patterns](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Creating a "Content OS" that learns and improves over time](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [Instrumenting the stack to track inputs, outputs, and feedback loops](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [Developing task-specific, domain-specific, and company-specific AI models](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### Current and Future Work Streams

  - [Editorial and content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [Social distribution and ghostwriting](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [Interview-based content and case studies](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
  - [Graphics and creative production](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)
  - [Lead magnets and newsletter creation](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
  - [Sales enablement and conversion support](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)

### Expansion and Future Plans

1.  Scale the Content OS to $15-20 million in revenue
2.  Open up the platform (e.g., fact-checker, deep researcher tools)
3.  Validate the core model in new domains (e.g., recruiting)

### Brand and Product Strategy

  - [Consider separate branding for different products/services](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Potential for a holding company structure](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Building in public and maintaining transparency](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Continue scaling the Content OS and make it stickier for clients](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [Explore opening up the platform and exposing APIs for specific tools](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
  - [Validate the core model in the recruiting domain](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
  - [Plan for international expansion](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Conduct a deep dive on brand and product strategy](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
  - [Increase transparency and sharing with the team and externally](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Schedule more time for Q\&A and AMA sessions in future all-hands meetings](https://fathom.video/share/B8QyR9UgDHiaaghfu7Sd_uZQxshR1DBm?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)
